author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — requires unrestricted access to src/hooks/mod.rs (FORBIDDEN under current cleanup scope).

**Fix outline:** Replace the 16-arm match in get_entries_for_event (src/hooks/mod.rs:456-481) with a single source of truth. Two options: (a) make HooksConfig hold a HashMap<HookEvent, Vec<HookEntry>> rather than 16 named Vec fields, with HookEvent deriving Hash/Eq — lookup becomes a single hashmap get, and adding an event only touches the enum; (b) generate the dispatch via macro_rules! taking a list of (variant, field) pairs and expanding to the match arms plus the is_empty check plus the config_key match. Either eliminates the 6-places-to-edit problem on new events.

**Blocking:** src/hooks/mod.rs is reserved scope.
